name: LG EXAONE 4.0 32B (Reasoning)
archDisplay: Dense hybrid-attention transformer, 64 layers, local:global attention 3:1, GQA (40Q/8KV), QK-Reorder-Norm; single checkpoint with toggleable non-reasoning/reasoning modes
note: Opt-in reasoning (enable_thinking=True) mode of Korea's first open-weight hybrid model; highest 32B-class score on math/coding/knowledge benchmarks.

results.notes: BFCL-v3 tool/function-calling score, reasoning mode. Confirmed identically on both the arXiv paper (html v1) and the HuggingFace model card table.

Tau-Bench Retail domain, reasoning mode (Airline domain separately scored 51.5; only the Retail split is added since the taxonomy has a single tau-bench slug, matching this repo's convention of one score per benchmarkSlug per model).
MMMLU (Multilingual MMLU) Spanish-language split, reasoning mode.
Humanity's Last Exam score from Artificial Analysis' independent test run (embedded model data: hle:0.10519...). Not previously tracked for this model under any source.

IFBench score from Artificial Analysis' independent test run (embedded model data: ifbench:0.36327...). Distinct benchmark from the already-tracked 'ifeval' slug (83.7, self-reported); ifbench itself was not tracked.

τ²-Bench Telecom-domain score from Artificial Analysis' independent test run (embedded model data field 'tau2', confirmed via AA's own evaluations page to specifically denote the Telecom domain of tau2-bench). Distinct from the already-tracked 'tau-bench' slug (62.8 self-reported, Tau-Bench Retail domain, a different benchmark/domain); tau2-bench-telecom itself was not tracked for this model.

verificationNotes: Same underlying checkpoint as the non-reasoning entry, verified identically (HF card, PR Newswire, release date, license, context, capabilities). LG's own PR Newswire release independently cites the reasoning-mode headline numbers (MMLU-Redux/Pro 92.3/81.8, GPQA-Diamond 75.4, AIME2025 85.3), corroborating them outside the paper. Fetched arxiv.org/html/2507.11407 and confirmed all 6 reasoning-mode rows (Table 3) match exactly: MMLU-Redux 92.3, MMLU-Pro 81.8, GPQA-Diamond 75.4, AIME2025 85.3, LiveCodeBench v5 72.6, IFEval 83.7 — no changes.
